name: PP-野牛 | 古董枪
descriptionEn: The Bizon SMG is low-damage, but offers a uniquely designed high-capacity drum magazine that reloads quickly. It has been painted using a combination of hydrographics and dry-transfer decals to create the look of a wood stock and gold inlay. With age comes wisdom and stopping power
descriptionZh: 野牛微型冲锋枪造成的伤害虽然较低，但它具有设计独特的高容量弹鼓，可以快速换弹。 这把武器将花纹和干式转印贴花结合起来，然后进行了涂装，以创造出木制品和黄金镶嵌的视觉效果。 随着岁月增长的除了智慧，还有杀伤力
